name: Double-Boiler Polenta with Gorgonzola+
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the double boiler polenta as directed in the recipe.
2. Stir in the softened butter until well combined.
3. Divide the polenta evenly among four serving bowls.
4. Place a slice of crumbled Gorgonzola cheese on top of each portion.
5. Serve immediately.
Recipe originally appeared in Jan/Feb 95 issue of Cook's magazine.
